title: LRU Cache with Capacity
description: Extend memoization to an LRU cache with capacity limits and eviction policy.
requirements: Implement put(&mut self, key: K, value: V)
Evict least recently used on capacity overflow
Use LinkedHashMap or custom doubly-linked list

few_shot_examples.prompt: LRU cache with HashMap and order tracking.
Move node to front of LRU list.
